sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Ka khualzin na leitungah, lawmhoih khatnei ing.
Tua in hongit ka To Zeisu hi,
Nisim hong lungdamsak, nisim la hongsa sak,
Lawmhoih Zeisu kaneih mah manpha bel.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Muvanlai bangin ah, ka thahat theih na ding,
Thakhauhna leh lungnopna hongpia,
Kalawmhoih Zeisu in thupha namkim hong pia.
Verse2
Zeisu tawh ka kimuh ni a kipan in ah,
Nisim in lungdam kipak den
Dahna thuakna te in hong buaisak zo nawn lo,
Lawmhoih Zeisu kaneih mah manpha bel,
Verse3.
Awkongit sanggam aw nang zong hongpai pah vaw,
A migi ka To Zeisu kiang ah,
Sapna khempeuh kicing, nang zong hong pianuam hi,
ing kongit kong it sanggam aw.
A ummi tadingin manpiak loh letsong hi,
Nuntak tawntung na na ngah na ding,
Tun Zeisu nasan leh vangam nang aa nit
